title: Section 20
content: 1[20. The Pro-Vice-Chancellor.--The Pro-Vice-Chancellor shall be appointed in such manner, and shall exercise such powers and perform such duties as may be prescribed by the Statutes.
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 34 of 1972, s. 16, (w.e.f. 17-6-1972). Earlier section 20 was rep. by Act 11 of 1945, s. 3 (w.e.f. 4-9-1945).
